title: Planetarium: Semi-realistic
description: Somewhat realistic planet scaling for Planetarium.
body:
# About
[Planetarium](https://modrinth.com/mod/planetarium)'s planets are scaled down to 33% of their original size (the North Star is 45% its original size) which will encourage people to use the spyglass when observing the planets in the night sky.

Normal scaling in Planetarium:
![The planet scaling Planetarium itself uses.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Hbvu4mjZ/images/302a1c237a3f5416a499f5883eaeb4065244b508.png)

Semi-realistic scaling with this resource pack:
![Planets have been scaled to 33% of their original size](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Hbvu4mjZ/images/cfe6898719efc5f502162adf5d30b981923e7857.png)
